---
id: open_issue
description: Open a new bounded issue from an explicit request
---

## Action: Open Issue

Persona: {{persona_name}} (`{{persona_id}}`)

Open exactly one bounded, `needs-triage` issue from the source request.

## Source

Link the request (discussion/issue/review) that asked for this issue.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] State clear, testable criteria for the new issue.

## Required output marker

```
ISSUE-OPENED: OPENED
```
